title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images representing different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a driver and highlights distinct characteristics associated with the cities.
key_claims: Beijing represents a modern urban landscape.
Chongqing is associated with reading and traditional architecture.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide introduces the theme of an evolving nation, focusing on a journey through China. It features images of taxis and famous buildings from Chinese cities.
key_claims: China is evolving as a nation.
The presentation will explore different cities and their developments.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session involves investigating and researching local features, development strategies, and the outcomes and positive impacts of city growth. The process is visualized in a flow chart.
key_claims: Investigation and research of local features are crucial.
Development strategies lead to outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide presents a matching exercise linking cities to their development strategies. Beijing is linked with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.
key_claims: Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration.
Hangzhou targets tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide reiterates development strategies through the perspective of taxi drivers, focusing on sustainable urban development, tourism growth, and technology integration. It emphasizes unique strategies based on local features.
key_claims: Unique strategies are developed based on local features.
Cities utilize specific strategies: sustainable development, tourism growth, and technology integration.
